task: Implement /Users/travisgilbert/Downloads/theorem-agentd-handoff (2).md on main: local theorem-agentd daemon, MCP tool-use loop, receiver sidecar shape, grammar guardrail, transcript mode, launchd example, and token ledger.

items.acceptance_criterion: A new `theorem-agentd` Rust crate is a `rustyredcore_THG` workspace member beside `theorem-receiver` and builds as a lib plus bin.
`theorem-agentd --once "<prompt>"` runs one tool-use turn and prints a full transcript with tool calls and results.
The daemon can read room context and can emit a schema-valid wake `coordinate` call for a coding head.
items.verification: `turn_loop::tests::deterministic_coordinate_call_is_schema_valid` verifies `delivery="wake"`, `mentions[0]="codex"`, and schema-required coordinate arguments; local fixture MCP smoke verifies `coordination_context` dispatch in the transcript loop.

items.acceptance_criterion: Tool-call output is closed over known tool names and malformed tool names are rejected before MCP dispatch.
items.verification: `cargo run -q -p theorem-agentd -- --print-tool-grammar crates/theorem-agentd/theorem-agentd.example.toml` printed a GBNF grammar with the closed tool-name set; `tools::tests::grammar_is_closed_over_catalog_names` and `tools::tests::validates_required_arguments` passed.

items.acceptance_criterion: Long-running daemon mode starts `theorem_receiver::run_loop` on its own OS thread and communicates only through the room.
items.verification: `receiver_sidecar::spawn_receiver_sidecar` loads `ReceiverConfig`, builds `HarnessClient`, and spawns `theorem_receiver::run_loop` on a named OS thread; `cargo check -p theorem-agentd` passed against the receiver library API.

items.acceptance_criterion: A single launchd job can run the daemon, while receiver embedding is controlled by daemon config.
items.verification: `crates/theorem-agentd/theorem-agentd.launchd.plist.example` added with one `theorem-agentd` program invocation; README documents no secrets in the plist.

items.acceptance_criterion: The daemon writes one JSONL ledger entry per model decision/tool turn for compute-offload and context A/B accounting.
items.verification: `ledger::tests::writes_jsonl_ledger` passed; local fixture `--once` smoke wrote 2 ledger lines for one tool call plus final reply.

items.deliverable: Real local model and personal-tool proof
items.acceptance_criterion: Gemma local serving and real TickTick/Gmail/Calendar MCP calls are proven against Travis's local services.
items.verification: Code paths and config stanzas exist for OpenAI-compatible model serving plus TickTick, Gmail, Calendar, and filesystem MCP servers.
items.deferral_reason: No local Gemma server, TickTick/Gmail/Calendar MCP endpoint, or personal credential surface was provided in this session. Live personal-tool mutation was not attempted.

items.deliverable: Live wake plus receiver dry-run proof
items.acceptance_criterion: A daemon-emitted wake message lands in the room and `theorem-receiver --wake-dry-run <room_id> codex` plans a Codex spawn for it.
items.verification: Manual harness coordination wake to `claude-code` was sent for collaboration; daemon coordinate emission is schema-tested and fixture-dispatched.
items.deferral_reason: A live daemon-fired wake would intentionally queue another local head. It should be run only with the desired receiver config and token for the target checkout.
